Table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

Card of table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

Name

MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

Code

MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

 

T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_ITEM_SALES_TAX

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

Full_Payload_Orderno AS ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK,

Full_Payload_Entries_Deliveryitemnumber AS DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Salestax_Juriscode AS JURISTDICTION_CODE_BK,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Salestax_Juristype AS JURISTDICTION_TYPE_BK,

Country AS COUNTRY_CODE,

Full_Payload_Customer_Customerno AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER,

Full_Payload_Ordertimestamp AS ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Salestax_Region AS SALES_TAX_REGION,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Salestax_Taxableamount AS TAXABLE_AMOUNT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Salestax_Taxcalculated AS CALCULATED_TAX,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Salestax_Taxtype AS TAX_TYPE,

CASE

WHEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) IS NOT NULL

AND COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO,

Full_Payload_Entries_Deliveryitemnumber,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Salestax_Juriscode,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Salestax_Juristype,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP

) = 1

THEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP)

ELSE __LOAD_TS

END AS VALID_FROM

-- [remaining technical columns]

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_ITEM_SALES_TAX

WHERE

(

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP IS NULL

OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) <= __LOAD_TS

)

;

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO, FULL_PAYLOAD_ENTRIES_DELIVERYITEMNUMBER, FULL_PAYLOAD_ENTRIES_SALESPRICE_SALESTAX_JURISCODE, FULL_PAYLOAD_ENTRIES_SALESPRICE_SALESTAX_JURISTYPE

Primary key(s) Target: ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK, JURISDICTION_CODE_BK, JURISDICTION_TYPE_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2 (use COALESCE(full_payload_orderTimestamp, __load_ts) as a reference for record versioning)

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 add join to MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER to sharing script

 

SELECT o.*

FROM MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX o

LEFT JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = o.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER

AND o.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND o.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR o.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

CKT_MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_


Server validation rule of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

drop table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX (
ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK TEXT not null,
JURISTDICTION_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
JURISTDICTION_TYPE_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT not null,
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME DATETIME,
SALES_TAX_REGION TEXT,
TAXABLE_AMOUNT DECIMAL,
CALCULATED_TAX DECIMAL,
TAX_TYPE TEXT,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_I primary key (ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK, JURISTDICTION_CODE_BK, JURISTDICTION_TYPE_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX set comment = 'This table keeps track of tax-related information for individual items in consumer orders.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Order number / identifier of the order assigned to the transaction.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK is
'Item number in the delivery/order.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.JURISTDICTION_CODE_BK is
'Tax jurisdiction Code used for tax calculation.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.JURISTDICTION_TYPE_BK is
'Tax jurisdiction type , e.g. State Tax';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER is
'Unique consumer identifier.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME is
'Timestamp when the order was created';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.SALES_TAX_REGION is
'Geographic region or area associated with applicable sales tax.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.TAXABLE_AMOUNT is
'Amount on which tax is calculated';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.CALCULATED_TAX is
'Final tax amount calculated for teh order item based on juristidiction rules.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.TAX_TYPE is
'Type of Tax applied.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active ';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.VALID_TO is
'It indicates When the record is no longer Active ';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the Record is Active';

Column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

VALID_FROM: SCD Type 2 start timestamp selected via cascading fallback- use full_payload_orderTimestamp; if null/invalid or not granular enough (identical across records) fall back to technical __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

Snowflake


Column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

VALID_TO: SCD2 end timestamp. Use the same cascade as VALID_FROM (full_payload_orderTimestamp → __LOAD_TS) to find the next change; if none exists (current row), set 9999-12-31.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

CKC_VALID_TO_MDE_HYBR

Maximum Value

 

Default Value

 

Unit

 

Format

 

Cannot Modify

No

Column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

Card of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_TAX

CKC_ACTIVE_FLAG_MDE_HYBR
